steps.title: Rearrange to collect all x terms on one side
Simplify and count solutions
steps.content:
Combine the coefficients of $x$:
$$(2,590 - 5,180)x = 0$$
$$-2,590x = 0$$
Since the coefficient of $x$ is nonzero, we can divide both sides to get:
$$x = 0$$
This linear equation has exactly one solution. That matches choice B — B is correct.
